body.content:
JR East Information Center | Travel Service Centers & Accessibility | JR-EAST
# JR East Information Center
![JR East Information Center](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/customer_support/img/renew/ic_img_lead.jpg)
For a more pleasant travel experience, JR East Information Centers are located in many stations to provide assistance to passengers. Our staff provides friendly assistance in English for non-Japanese passengers all year-round.
This is a convenient way to get assistance with train schedules, travel guidance and other information about JR. We look forward to serving you.
## Locations and Hours of Operation
![JR East Information Center Landmark](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/customer_support/img/renew/icon_ic.png)
This sign is the landmark of the JR East Information Center.
* ### [TokyoOpens in a new window](https://www.jreast.co.jp/en/e/stations/e1039.html)
1F
Central Passage
10:00 - 18:00

Marunouchi Central Exit
10:00 - 18:00

Marunouchi Underground Central Exit
\* Inside the ticket gates
10:00 - 18:00
* ### [ShinjukuOpens in a new window](https://www.jreast.co.jp/en/e/stations/e866.html)

South Gate
\* Inside the ticket gates
10:00 - 18:00

\* Outside the ticket gates
10:00 - 17:00

\* Inside the ticket gates
10:00 - 17:00
* ### [UenoOpens in a new window](https://www.jreast.co.jp/en/e/stations/e204.html)
1F
Central Gate
\* Outside the ticket gates
10:00 - 18:00
Office hours are subject to change and offices are subject to close without notice.

](https://www.jreast.co.jp/en/multi/stations/)

* [Major railway and Subway Route Map: Metropolitan AreaOpen in new window

## Available at the Center
We assist you with train time schedules, travel guidance and other information about JR.
